AddItemArray

Description

Adds a child item of JsonArrayItem type in the JSON generator object.

Applies to

JSONGenerator objects

Syntax

objectname.AddItemArray ( ParentItemHandle )
objectname.AddItemArray ( ParentItemHandle, Key )
objectname.AddItemArray ( ParentItemPath )
objectname.AddItemArray ( ParentItemPath, Key )
objectnameThe name of the JSONGenerator object in which you want to add an item.
ParentItemHandleA long whose value is the handle of the parent item of JsonArrayItem or JsonObjectItem type.
ParentItemPathA string whose value is the path of the parent item of JsonArrayItem or JsonObjectItem type.
KeyA string whose value is the key of the child item.

Return value

Long. Returns the handle of the new child item if it succeeds and -1 if an error occurs.
